title: andryala lyrata var. ramosissima
intro: Andryala lyrata var. ramosissima, also known as the branched andryala or branched androsace, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andryala lyrata var. ramosissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving the leaves and flowers being dried and then used in infusions or applied topically to the skin.
